Examples.Title: Get task detail
Examples.Description: Return details about a task. Consumers of this API should not expect updates more frequent than once every five seconds for a given task.
Examples.Code:
### Get task detail
GET {{host}}/v1/tasks/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
X-Runway-Version: 2024-11-06
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The task does not exist, or was deleted or canceled.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Run a published workflow
Examples.Description: Start a new task to execute a published workflow. You can optionally provide custom input values via `nodeOutputs` to override the defaults defined in the workflow graph.

Examples.Title: Get workflow invocation detail
Examples.Description: Return details about a workflow invocation. Consumers of this API should not expect updates more frequent than once every five seconds for a given workflow invocation.
Examples.Code:
### Get workflow invocation detail
GET {{host}}/v1/workflow_invocations/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
X-Runway-Version: 2024-11-06
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The workflow invocation does not exist, was deleted or canceled, or is not a workflow task.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List published workflows
Examples.Description: Returns a list of all published workflows for the authenticated user, grouped by source workflow with their published versions.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Runway;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get workflow details
Examples.Description: Returns details about a specific published workflow, including its graph schema.
Examples.Code:
### Get workflow details
GET {{host}}/v1/workflows/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
X-Runway-Version: 2024-11-06
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The workflow details including graph schema.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The workflow does not exist or was deleted.
# Content-Type: application/json
